title: Clearly Till Roll, Box of 20 Till Rolls, 80x80mm, Thermal Paper for POS Systems, BPA-Free White Paper Roll
features: EXTRA VALUE BULK - with 20 thermal till rolls that comply with all regulations for till roll paper for all cash registers, machines and point-of-sale systems

COMPATIBLE WITH MANY POS SYSTEMS - including Barclays, Paypoint, Ingenico, Verifone, PAX, Spire Payments, Payzone, Streamline and EFTPOS PDQ credit card terminals as well as Sagem, Ingenico IWL, ICT, Move and Desktop plus Clover Flex
EASY TO USE - designed for effortless installation, the user-friendly printing paper is tightly wound so it doesn't' tangle or jam during the printing process - simply slide into the printer and go
MADE WITH PREMIUM QUALITY - manufactured in the UK using high grade 58gsm paper roll that combines durability and quality for smudge-free professional prints that don't fade
CONTAINS NO HARMFUL CHEMICALS - this thermal printer paper is BPA-free so it's safe for you and customers to handle
description: "Our value bulk till rolls for card machine – a pack of thermal till rolls 80 x 80mm that meet all regulations for thermal paper till roll, catering to a variety of cash registers, machines, and point-of-sale systems. Compatible with renowned POS systems such as Barclays, Paypoint, Ingenico, Verifone, and more, these cash register printer paper rolls ensure seamless integration with your devices. Card machine rolls manufactured in the UK using premium quality paper, these card machine paper rolls guarantee durability and superior print quality, delivering smudge-free, professional till roll prints. Committed to a greener future, our credit card rolls are recyclable, contributing to waste reduction and economic sustainability. With compatibility spanning major credit card terminals and printer models, including Sagem, Ingenico IWL, ICT, and Clover Flex, these thermal printing paper rolls offer versatility and efficiency. Plus, our commitment to safety extends to the composition of the receipt printer paper – it contains no harmful chemicals, making it BPA-free and safe for both you and your customers to handle. Elevate your printing experience with these reliable, eco-friendly thermal printer paper."
